Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Excise Tax Act (school supplies)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Excise Tax Act (school supplies)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends Schedule VI to the Excise Tax Act in order to add school supplies to the list of zero-rated supplies.
Whereas every means must be used to promote childrenâs success in school to help them reach their full potential;

And whereas the back-to-school season entails expenses for the purchase of school supplies needed to allow children to succeed, which increases the burden on families, especially those experiencing financial difficulties;
Now, therefore, Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Schedule VI to the Excise Tax Act is amended by adding the following after Part III:
A supply of school supplies and books, dictionaries and workbooks for use in a school setting when they are supplied during any of the following periods:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the period beginning on August 15 and ending on September 15; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the period beginning on January 1 and ending on January 31.

Section.Text: A supply of electronic devices with a selling price of less than $1,500 and educational software for use in a school setting when they are supplied during any of the following periods:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the period beginning on August 15 and ending on September 15; and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the period beginning on January 1 and ending on January 31.
